achievements.title: Dropping Some Eaves
achievements.description: Infiltrate the 1F ventilation duct and listen in on the guards talking about the intruder

achievements.title: I'm Not Being Stealthy At All!
achievements.description: Infiltrate the 2F ventilation duct and listen in on the guards talking about the intruder

achievements.title: Missing Something
achievements.description: Infiltrate either ventilation duct and listen in on the guards without ever having been spotted

achievements.description: Team up with the mysterious soldier and fight your way out of the prison

achievements.description: Reach the prison battle without obtaining the SOCOM

achievements.description: Defeat Revolver Ocelot and rescue the ArmsTech president

achievements.description: Defeat Revolver Ocelot using only the SOCOM, firing no more than 12 bullets (No Bandana)

achievements.description: Defeat Ocelot before he can reload his gun (No Bandana)

achievements.description: Take out the electric panel in one shot (No Bandana)

achievements.title: I Remember That Punch...
achievements.description: Defeat the cyborg ninja and learn his true identity

achievements.description: Defeat the ninja without taking damage (No Bandana)

achievements.title: I Make My Own Future
achievements.description: Defeat Psycho Mantis and end his games once and for all

achievements.description: Defeat Psycho Mantis using the other method

achievements.description: Resist the torture and escape the prison

achievements.description: Successfully resist the torture scene and escape without having saved for the entire game

achievements.description: Climb the communications tower

achievements.description: Survive the tower elevator ride
